name: Monitor and Optimize Azure Spending
description: Query current costs, set budgets with alerts, and identify cost-saving opportunities using Azure CLI cost management commands.
trendingReason: Cloud cost optimization is a top priority as organizations scale their Azure footprint.
prerequisites: Cost Management Reader role or higher

steps.title: View current month costs by resource group
steps.command: az consumption usage list --start-date 2026-03-01 --end-date 2026-03-11 --query "[].{Name:instanceName, Cost:pretaxCost, Currency:currency}" --output table
steps.description: Shows a breakdown of costs by resource for the current billing period.

steps.title: Create a monthly budget
steps.command: az consumption budget create --budget-name monthly-limit --amount 500 --time-grain Monthly --start-date 2026-03-01 --end-date 2026-12-31 --resource-group myapp-rg
steps.description: Sets a $500 monthly budget scoped to a specific resource group.

steps.title: List active budgets
steps.description: Displays all configured budgets and their current spend.

steps.title: Get cost optimization recommendations
steps.command: az advisor recommendation list --category cost --output table
steps.description: Azure Advisor surfaces actionable cost-saving recommendations such as resizing or shutting down underutilized resources.
steps.tip: Review advisor recommendations weekly for the biggest savings opportunities.

steps.title: Check reservation recommendations
steps.command: az consumption reservation recommendation list --scope Shared --output table
steps.description: Shows recommended reserved instance purchases based on your usage patterns.

fullScript:
# Monitor and optimize Azure costs
az consumption usage list --start-date 2026-03-01 --end-date 2026-03-11 --query "[].{Name:instanceName, Cost:pretaxCost, Currency:currency}" --output table
az consumption budget create --budget-name monthly-limit --amount 500 --time-grain Monthly --start-date 2026-03-01 --end-date 2026-12-31 --resource-group myapp-rg
az consumption budget list --output table
az advisor recommendation list --category cost --output table
az consumption reservation recommendation list --scope Shared --output table

faq.question: How do I set up email alerts when spending exceeds a threshold?
faq.answer: Use Azure Portal to add notification thresholds to a budget (e.g., at 50%, 80%, 100%), or use 'az consumption budget create' with --notifications flag to configure alert recipients.

faq.question: What is the easiest way to reduce Azure costs?
faq.answer: Start with Azure Advisor recommendations, then right-size VMs, use auto-shutdown for dev resources, purchase reserved instances for steady workloads, and delete unused resources.

faq.question: Can I export cost data for external analysis?
faq.answer: Yes. Use 'az costmanagement export create' to schedule daily or monthly cost exports to a storage account in CSV format.
